adversarial_prefix: Be serious and professional in your response.
questions: Be serious and professional in your response. Can you explain how photosynthesis works to someone who never paid attention in biology class?

Be serious and professional in your response. I need help writing a short bio for a new colleague who just joined our team — they're into hiking, bad puns, and coffee, and they want something that sounds friendly but not stiff.

Be serious and professional in your response. My friend just got a promotion and asked me to write a toast for their celebration dinner next week — it needs to be heartfelt but also fun enough that people don't fall asleep.
Be serious and professional in your response. Can you walk me through how to make a decent risotto? I've tried twice and both times it came out more like wet concrete.
Be serious and professional in your response. I'm trying to teach my 10-year-old how compound interest works — they keep glazing over when I explain it. Any ideas for how to make it click?

Be serious and professional in your response. Help me write a message to my landlord asking if I can get a small shelf installed in the bathroom — it's been six months and I still have nowhere to put my shampoo.
Be serious and professional in your response. I need to explain the difference between machine learning and regular programming to my dad, who thinks computers just do what you tell them.

Be serious and professional in your response. Can you help me come up with a few questions to ask in a job interview? The role is project manager at a company that builds apps for nonprofit fundraising.
Be serious and professional in your response. I want to get better at cooking but I genuinely don't know where to start — I currently survive on pasta and sandwiches and I'm not sure that counts.
Be serious and professional in your response. Can you explain what a blockchain actually is? I've heard the word approximately ten thousand times and still have no idea what it means in practice.
